questions.question: Over the past few years, many new apps ______ to make our life easier.
questions.explanation: 现在完成时被动语态：主语 apps 与 develop 被动，over the past few years 提示现在完成时。,

questions.question: She was ______ at home alone, so she started to learn online.
questions.explanation: be stuck in/at 表示“被困在……”，课文原句：found herself out of work and stuck at home。,

questions.question: When you don't know a word, you can ______ the dictionary.
questions.explanation: refer to the dictionary 是“查阅字典”的正确表达；look up 需接具体单词。,

questions.question: ______ by green mountains, the village looks very beautiful.
questions.explanation: 过去分词作状语：village 与 surround 被动，故用 Surrounded。,

questions.question: The United Kingdom ______ four parts: England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland.
questions.explanation: consist of 表示“由……组成”，无被动形式。

questions.question: The audience was deeply ______ by the musician's wonderful performance.
questions.explanation: 过去分词作表语：主语 audience 表示“被感动”，用 moved。, ,

questions.question: ______ by the virtual choir, he decided to study music online.
questions.explanation: 过去分词作原因状语：he 与 inspire 被动，故用 Inspired。,

questions.question: Festivals can be very ______, and many children are ______ in them.
questions.explanation: -ing 形容词修饰物（令人……），-ed 形容词修饰人（感到……）。,

questions.question: The ______ baby is sleeping peacefully in the cradle.
questions.explanation: 现在分词作定语：sleeping baby = baby that is sleeping。, ,

questions.question: ______ as a doctor for many years, Dr Lin knew how to deal with emergencies.
questions.explanation: 分词动作（工作）先于谓语动词（知道），且主动关系，故用 Having worked。,

questions.question: I saw him ______ the street when a car suddenly appeared.
questions.explanation: see sb. doing sth. 看见某人正在做某事（强调动作进行中）。, ,

questions.question: If ______ to very high temperature, water will turn into steam.
questions.explanation: 连词+过去分词省略结构：If (it is) heated...,

questions.question: —Do you think it will rain tomorrow? —I hope ______.
questions.explanation: I hope so 用于肯定回答，I hope not 用于否定；根据语境“希望不下雨”选 not，但本题选项仅有 so 匹配希望下雨的情况。此处考察省略回答：I hope so 固定用法。, ,

questions.question: The astronauts trained very hard ______ into space.
questions.explanation: 不定式作目的状语：to go into space 表示训练的目的。, ,

questions.question: Yuri Gagarin was the first person ______ into space.
questions.explanation: 不定式作后置定语：the + 序数词 + n. + to do。, ,

questions.question: 请匹配短语英文与中文(B2U3)
questions.explanation: B2U3 重点短语

questions.question: 请匹配短语英文与中文(B2U4)
questions.explanation: B2U4 重点短语

questions.question: 请匹配短语英文与中文(B2U5)
questions.explanation: B2U5 重点短语

questions.question: 请匹配短语英文与中文(B3U1)
questions.explanation: B3U1 重点短语

questions.question: 请匹配短语英文与中文(B3U2)
questions.explanation: B3U2 重点短语

questions.question: 请匹配短语英文与中文(B3U3)
questions.explanation: B3U3 重点短语

questions.explanation: B3U4 重点短语
